mapper.update: INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_MASTER (ID, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, DELETE_YN, STOCK_ID, NAME, PRICE, PRICE_BEFOREDAY, FACE_VALUE, MARKET_CAPITALIZATION, STOCK_QTY, FOREIGNER_RATIO, VOLUMN, PER, ESTIMATION_PER, ROE, PBR, BPS, INDUSTRY_PER, INDUSTRY_BAISSE, INVESTMENT_OPINION, TARGET_PRICE, MAX_52, MIN_52, DIVIDEND_RATE,NATIONAL,EPS,ESTIMATION_EPS, FUND_PAY) VALUES ( get_seq('ST_STOCK_MASTER'), NOW(), NOW(), 'N', #{stockId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{priceBeforeday}, #{faceValue}, #{marketCapitalization}, #{stockQty}, #{foreignerRatio}, #{volumn}, #{per}, #{estimationPer}, #{roe}, #{pbr}, #{bps}, #{industryPer}, #{industryBaisse}, #{investmentOpinion}, #{targetPrice}, #{max52}, #{min52}, #{dividendRate}, #{national}, #{eps}, #{estimationEps}, #{fundPay}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE DELETE_YN = 'N', UPDATE_DATE = NOW(), STOCK_ID = #{stockId}, NAME = #{name}, PRICE = #{price}, PRICE_BEFOREDAY = #{priceBeforeday}, FACE_VALUE = #{faceValue}, MARKET_CAPITALIZATION = #{marketCapitalization}, STOCK_QTY = #{stockQty}, FOREIGNER_RATIO = #{foreignerRatio}, VOLUMN = #{volumn}, PER = #{per}, ESTIMATION_PER = #{estimationPer}, ROE = #{roe}, PBR = #{pbr}, BPS = #{bps}, INDUSTRY_PER = #{industryPer}, INDUSTRY_BAISSE = #{industryBaisse}, INVESTMENT_OPINION = #{investmentOpinion}, TARGET_PRICE = #{targetPrice}, MAX_52 = #{max52}, MIN_52 = #{min52}, DIVIDEND_RATE=#{dividendRate}, NATIONAL = #{national}, EPS = #{eps}, ESTIMATION_EPS = #{estimationEps}, FUND_PAY = #{fundPay}

INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_MASTER (ID, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, STOCK_ID, NAME, PRICE, PRICE_BEFOREDAY, FACE_VALUE, MARKET_CAPITALIZATION, STOCK_QTY, FOREIGNER_RATIO, VOLUMN, PER, ESTIMATION_PER, ROE, PBR, BPS, INDUSTRY_PER, INDUSTRY_BAISSE, INVESTMENT_OPINION, TARGET_PRICE, MAX_52, MIN_52, DIVIDEND_RATE, NATIONAL, EPS, ESTIMATION_EPS, FUND_PAY) VALUES
( get_seq('ST_STOCK_MASTER'), NOW(), NOW(), #{vo.stockId}, #{vo.name}, #{vo.price}, #{vo.priceBeforeday}, #{vo.faceValue}, #{vo.marketCapitalization}, #{vo.stockQty}, #{vo.foreignerRatio}, #{vo.volumn}, #{vo.per}, #{vo.estimationPer}, #{vo.roe}, #{vo.pbr}, #{vo.bps}, #{vo.industryPer}, #{vo.industryBaisse}, #{vo.investmentOpinion}, #{vo.targetPrice}, #{vo.max52}, #{vo.min52}, #{vo.dividendRate}, #{vo.national}, #{vo.eps}, #{vo.estimationEps}, #{vo.fundPay})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE UPDATE_DATE = NOW(), NAME = VALUES(NAME), PRICE = VALUES(PRICE), PRICE_BEFOREDAY = VALUES(PRICE_BEFOREDAY), FACE_VALUE = VALUES(FACE_VALUE), MARKET_CAPITALIZATION = VALUES(MARKET_CAPITALIZATION), STOCK_QTY = VALUES(STOCK_QTY), FOREIGNER_RATIO = VALUES(FOREIGNER_RATIO), VOLUMN = VALUES(VOLUMN), PER = VALUES(PER), ESTIMATION_PER = VALUES(ESTIMATION_PER), ROE = VALUES(ROE), PBR = VALUES(PBR), BPS = VALUES(BPS), INDUSTRY_PER = VALUES(INDUSTRY_PER), INDUSTRY_BAISSE = VALUES(INDUSTRY_BAISSE), INVESTMENT_OPINION = VALUES(INVESTMENT_OPINION), TARGET_PRICE = VALUES(TARGET_PRICE), MAX_52 = VALUES(MAX_52), MIN_52 = VALUES(MIN_52), DIVIDEND_RATE = VALUES(DIVIDEND_RATE), NATIONAL = VALUES(NATIONAL), EPS = VALUES(EPS), ESTIMATION_EPS = VALUES(ESTIMATION_EPS), FUND_PAY = VALUES(FUND_PAY)

INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_MASTER (ID, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, DELETE_YN, STOCK_ID, NAME, PRICE, MARKET_CAPITALIZATION) VALUES ( get_seq('ST_STOCK_MASTER'), NOW(), NOW(), 'N', #{stockId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{marketCapitalization} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE UPDATE_DATE = NOW(), NAME = VALUES(NAME), PRICE = VALUES(PRICE), MARKET_CAPITALIZATION = VALUES(MARKET_CAPITALIZATION)

INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_MASTER (ID, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, DELETE_YN, STOCK_ID, NAME, PRICE, MARKET_CAPITALIZATION) VALUES ( get_seq('ST_STOCK_MASTER'), NOW(), NOW(), 'N', #{stockId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{marketCapitalization} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE DELETE_YN = 'N'

INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_MASTER (ID, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, STOCK_ID, NAME, PRICE, MARKET_CAPITALIZATION) VALUES
( get_seq('ST_STOCK_MASTER'), NOW(), NOW(), #{vo.stockId}, #{vo.name}, #{vo.price}, #{vo.marketCapitalization} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE UPDATE_DATE = NOW(), STOCK_ID = VALUES(STOCK_ID), NAME = VALUES(NAME), PRICE = VALUES(PRICE), MARKET_CAPITALIZATION = VALUES(MARKET_CAPITALIZATION)

INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_FINANCIAL (ID, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, TOTAL_SALES, PROFITS, EARNINGS, PROFITS_RATIO, NET_PROFIT_RATIO, ROE, DEPT_RATIO, RESERVE_RATIO, EPS, PER, BPS, PBR, DIVIDENDS_PER_SHARE, DIVIDENDS_RATE, DIVIDENDS_TENDENCY, YEAR, STOCK_ID, STOCK_MASTER_ID, SHARES_OUTSTANDING, TOTAL_ASSETS, TOTAL_DEPT, TOTAL_CAPITAL, CAPITAL) VALUES ( get_seq('ST_STOCK_FINANCIAL'), NOW(), NOW(), #{totalSales}, #{profits}, #{earnings}, #{profitsRatio}, #{netProfitRatio}, #{roe}, #{deptRatio}, #{reserveRatio}, #{eps}, #{per}, #{bps}, #{pbr}, #{dividendsPerShare}, #{dividendsRate}, #{dividendsTendency}, #{year}, #{stockId}, #{stockMasterId}, #{sharesOutstanding}, #{totalAssets}, #{totalDept}, #{totalCapital}, #{capital}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE UPDATE_DATE = NOW(), TOTAL_SALES = #{totalSales}, PROFITS = #{profits}, EARNINGS = #{earnings}, PROFITS_RATIO = #{profitsRatio}, NET_PROFIT_RATIO = #{netProfitRatio}, ROE = #{roe}, DEPT_RATIO = #{deptRatio}, RESERVE_RATIO = #{reserveRatio}, EPS = #{eps}, PER = #{per}, BPS = #{bps}, PBR = #{pbr}, DIVIDENDS_PER_SHARE = #{dividendsPerShare}, DIVIDENDS_RATE = #{dividendsRate}, DIVIDENDS_TENDENCY = #{dividendsTendency}, YEAR = #{year}, STOCK_ID = #{stockId}, STOCK_MASTER_ID = #{stockMasterId}, SHARES_OUTSTANDING = #{sharesOutstanding}, TOTAL_ASSETS = #{totalAssets}, TOTAL_DEPT = #{totalDept}, TOTAL_CAPITAL = #{totalCapital}, CAPITAL = #{capital}

INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_FINANCIAL (ID,UPDATE_DATE, YEAR, STOCK_ID, liquid_Asset,liquid_Dept,total_Stock_Qty,common_Stock_Qty,preferred_Stock_Qty) VALUES ( get_seq('ST_STOCK_FINANCIAL'), NOW(), #{year}, #{stockId}, #{liquidAsset},#{liquidDept},#{totalStockQty},#{commonStockQty},#{preferredStockQty}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE UPDATE_DATE = NOW(),liquid_Asset = #{liquidAsset}, liquid_Dept = #{liquidDept},total_Stock_Qty = #{totalStockQty}, common_Stock_Qty = #{commonStockQty}, preferred_Stock_Qty=#{preferredStockQty}

INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_FINANCIAL (ID, UPDATE_DATE, YEAR, STOCK_ID, OPERATING_CASH_FLOW) VALUES (get_seq('ST_STOCK_FINANCIAL'), NOW(), #{year}, #{stockId}, #{operatingCashFlow}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE UPDATE_DATE = NOW(), OPERATING_CASH_FLOW = #{operatingCashFlow}
UPDATE ST_STOCK_MASTER SET VALUE_UP_YN = #{valueUpYn} WHERE STOCK_ID = #{stockId}
UPDATE ST_STOCK_MASTER SET VALUE_UP_YN = 'N' WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT STOCK_ID stockId, NAME name FROM ST_STOCK_MASTER WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND (NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR STOCK_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY NAME LIMIT 20
mapper.update: INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_CATEGORY (ID, CATEGORY_TYPE, CATEGORY_NO, CATEGORY_NAME) VALUES ( get_seq('ST_STOCK_CATEGORY'), #{categoryType}, #{categoryNo}, #{categoryName}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CATEGORY_TYPE = #{categoryType}, CATEGORY_NAME = #{categoryName}

INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_CATEGORY_LINK (ID, CATEGORY_NO, STOCK_ID) VALUES ( get_seq('ST_STOCK_CATEGORY_LINK'), #{categoryNo}, #{stockId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CATEGORY_NO = #{categoryNo}, STOCK_ID = #{stockId}

INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_DAILY_PRICE (ID, STOCK_ID, TRADING_DATE, CLOSING_PRICE, PREVIOUS_DAY_RATE, FLUCTUATION_RATE, VOLUMN, ORGAN_TRADING_VOLUMN, FOREIGN_TRADING_VOLUMN, FOREIGN_HOLDING_VOLUMN, FOREIGN_HOLDING_RATE) VALUES ( get_seq('ST_STOCK_DAILY_PRICE'), #{stockId}, #{tradingDate}, #{closingPrice}, #{previousDayRate}, #{fluctuationRate}, #{volumn}, #{organTradingVolumn}, #{foreignTradingVolumn}, #{foreignHoldingVolumn}, #{foreignHoldingRate}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CLOSING_PRICE = #{closingPrice}, PREVIOUS_DAY_RATE = #{previousDayRate}, FLUCTUATION_RATE = #{fluctuationRate}, VOLUMN = #{volumn}, ORGAN_TRADING_VOLUMN = #{organTradingVolumn}, FOREIGN_TRADING_VOLUMN = #{foreignTradingVolumn}, FOREIGN_HOLDING_VOLUMN = #{foreignHoldingVolumn}, FOREIGN_HOLDING_RATE = #{foreignHoldingRate}

INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_DAILY_PRICE (ID, STOCK_ID, TRADING_DATE, CLOSING_PRICE, PREVIOUS_DAY_RATE, FLUCTUATION_RATE, VOLUMN, ORGAN_TRADING_VOLUMN, FOREIGN_TRADING_VOLUMN, FOREIGN_HOLDING_VOLUMN, FOREIGN_HOLDING_RATE) VALUES
( get_seq('ST_STOCK_DAILY_PRICE'), #{vo.stockId}, #{vo.tradingDate}, #{vo.closingPrice}, #{vo.previousDayRate}, #{vo.fluctuationRate}, #{vo.volumn}, #{vo.organTradingVolumn}, #{vo.foreignTradingVolumn}, #{vo.foreignHoldingVolumn}, #{vo.foreignHoldingRate})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CLOSING_PRICE = VALUES(CLOSING_PRICE), PREVIOUS_DAY_RATE = VALUES(PREVIOUS_DAY_RATE), FLUCTUATION_RATE = VALUES(FLUCTUATION_RATE), VOLUMN = VALUES(VOLUMN), ORGAN_TRADING_VOLUMN = VALUES(ORGAN_TRADING_VOLUMN), FOREIGN_TRADING_VOLUMN = VALUES(FOREIGN_TRADING_VOLUMN), FOREIGN_HOLDING_VOLUMN = VALUES(FOREIGN_HOLDING_VOLUMN), FOREIGN_HOLDING_RATE = VALUES(FOREIGN_HOLDING_RATE)
mapper.select:
SELECT E.ID id, E.YEAR year, E.STOCK_ID stockId, M.NAME name, E.GREEN_HOUSE_EMISSION greenHouseEmission, E.ENERGY_USAGE energyUsage, E.FINE_DUST_USAGE fineDustUsage, E.WATER_RECYCLING_RATE waterRecyclingRate, E.WASTE_RECYCLING_RATE wasteRecyclingRate, E.AVERAGE_ANNUAL_SALARY averageAnnualSalary, E.NON_REGULAR_EMPLYMENT_RATE nonRegularEmplymentRate, E.DONATION donation, E.CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_YEAR continuousServiceYear, E.OUTSIDE_DIRECTOR_RATE outsideDirectorRate, E.LARGEST_SHARE_HOLDER_RATIO largestShareHolderRatio, E.DIRECTORATE_INDEPENDENCE directorateIndependence, E.EXECUTIVE_AVERAGE_ANNUAL_SALARY executiveAverageAnnualSalary, E.SALARY_RATIO salaryRatio, E.UPDATE_DATE updateDate FROM ST_STOCK_ESG E LEFT JOIN ST_STOCK_MASTER M ON E.STOCK_ID = M.STOCK_ID WHERE 1=1
AND (E.STOCK_ID = #{stockId} OR M.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{stockId}, '%'))
AND E.YEAR = #{year}
ORDER BY E.STOCK_ID, E.YEAR DESC
mapper.update: INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_ESG (ID, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, YEAR, STOCK_ID, GREEN_HOUSE_EMISSION, ENERGY_USAGE, FINE_DUST_USAGE, WATER_RECYCLING_RATE, WASTE_RECYCLING_RATE, AVERAGE_ANNUAL_SALARY, NON_REGULAR_EMPLYMENT_RATE, DONATION, CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_YEAR, OUTSIDE_DIRECTOR_RATE, LARGEST_SHARE_HOLDER_RATIO, DIRECTORATE_INDEPENDENCE, EXECUTIVE_AVERAGE_ANNUAL_SALARY, SALARY_RATIO) VALUES ( get_seq('ST_STOCK_ESG'), NOW(), NOW(), #{year}, #{stockId}, #{greenHouseEmission}, #{energyUsage}, #{fineDustUsage}, #{waterRecyclingRate}, #{wasteRecyclingRate}, #{averageAnnualSalary}, #{nonRegularEmplymentRate}, #{donation}, #{continuousServiceYear}, #{outsideDirectorRate}, #{largestShareHolderRatio}, #{directorateIndependence}, #{executiveAverageAnnualSalary}, #{salaryRatio}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE UPDATE_DATE = NOW(), YEAR = #{year}, STOCK_ID = #{stockId}, GREEN_HOUSE_EMISSION = #{greenHouseEmission}, ENERGY_USAGE = #{energyUsage}, FINE_DUST_USAGE = #{fineDustUsage}, WATER_RECYCLING_RATE = #{waterRecyclingRate}, WASTE_RECYCLING_RATE = #{wasteRecyclingRate}, AVERAGE_ANNUAL_SALARY = #{averageAnnualSalary}, NON_REGULAR_EMPLYMENT_RATE = #{nonRegularEmplymentRate}, DONATION = #{donation}, CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_YEAR = #{continuousServiceYear}, OUTSIDE_DIRECTOR_RATE = #{outsideDirectorRate}, LARGEST_SHARE_HOLDER_RATIO = #{largestShareHolderRatio}, DIRECTORATE_INDEPENDENCE = #{directorateIndependence}, EXECUTIVE_AVERAGE_ANNUAL_SALARY = #{executiveAverageAnnualSalary}, SALARY_RATIO = #{salaryRatio}

INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_MARKET_INDEX (ID, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, YYYYMMDD, DOMESTIC_INTEREST_CALL, DOMESTIC_INTEREST_CD, DOMESTIC_INTEREST_COFIX_MANF, DOMESTIC_INTEREST_COFIX_OUTB, DOMESTIC_INTEREST_NCOFIX_OUTB, STANDARD_INTEREST_US, STANDARD_INTEREST_KR, STANDARD_INTEREST_EU, STANDARD_INTEREST_GB, STANDARD_INTEREST_JP, METAL_GC, METAL_CMDT, METAL_SI, METAL_HG, METAL_PL, TRANSPORT_CCF, TRANSPORT_SCF, TRANSPORT_BADI, TRANSPORT_BACK, TRANSPORT_BPNI, TRANSPORT_BSIS, TRANSPORT_BHSI, TRANSPORT_BAID, TRANSPORT_BAIT, BOND_US10YT, BOND_KR10YT, BOND_JP10YT, BOND_DE10YT, BOND_CN10YT, ENERGY_CL, ENERGY_LCO, ENERGY_RB, ENERGY_HO, ENERGY_DCB) VALUES (get_seq('ST_STOCK_MARKET_INDEX'), NOW(), NOW(), #{yyyymmdd}, #{domesticInterestCall}, #{domesticInterestCd}, #{domesticInterestCofixManf}, #{domesticInterestCofixOutb}, #{domesticInterestNcofixOutb}, #{standardInterestUs}, #{standardInterestKr}, #{standardInterestEu}, #{standardInterestGb}, #{standardInterestJp}, #{metalGc}, #{metalCmdt}, #{metalSi}, #{metalHg}, #{metalPl}, #{transportCcf}, #{transportScf}, #{transportBadi}, #{transportBack}, #{transportBpni}, #{transportBsis}, #{transportBhsi}, #{transportBaid}, #{transportBait}, #{bondUs10yt}, #{bondKr10yt}, #{bondJp10yt}, #{bondDe10yt}, #{bondCn10yt}, #{energyCl}, #{energyLco}, #{energyRb}, #{energyHo}, #{energyDcb}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE UPDATE_DATE = NOW(), YYYYMMDD = #{yyyymmdd}, DOMESTIC_INTEREST_CALL = #{domesticInterestCall}, DOMESTIC_INTEREST_CD = #{domesticInterestCd}, DOMESTIC_INTEREST_COFIX_MANF = #{domesticInterestCofixManf}, DOMESTIC_INTEREST_COFIX_OUTB = #{domesticInterestCofixOutb}, DOMESTIC_INTEREST_NCOFIX_OUTB = #{domesticInterestNcofixOutb}, STANDARD_INTEREST_US = #{standardInterestUs}, STANDARD_INTEREST_KR = #{standardInterestKr}, STANDARD_INTEREST_EU = #{standardInterestEu}, STANDARD_INTEREST_GB = #{standardInterestGb}, STANDARD_INTEREST_JP = #{standardInterestJp}, METAL_GC = #{metalGc}, METAL_CMDT = #{metalCmdt}, METAL_SI = #{metalSi}, METAL_HG = #{metalHg}, METAL_PL = #{metalPl}, TRANSPORT_CCF = #{transportCcf}, TRANSPORT_SCF = #{transportScf}, TRANSPORT_BADI = #{transportBadi}, TRANSPORT_BACK = #{transportBack}, TRANSPORT_BPNI = #{transportBpni}, TRANSPORT_BSIS = #{transportBsis}, TRANSPORT_BHSI = #{transportBhsi}, TRANSPORT_BAID = #{transportBaid}, TRANSPORT_BAIT = #{transportBait}, BOND_US10YT = #{bondUs10yt}, BOND_KR10YT = #{bondKr10yt}, BOND_JP10YT = #{bondJp10yt}, BOND_DE10YT = #{bondDe10yt}, BOND_CN10YT = #{bondCn10yt}, ENERGY_CL = #{energyCl}, ENERGY_LCO = #{energyLco}, ENERGY_RB = #{energyRb}, ENERGY_HO = #{energyHo}, ENERGY_DCB = #{energyDcb}
mapper.select: SELECT D.STOCK_ID stockId, D.TRADING_DATE tradingDate, D.CLOSING_PRICE closingPrice FROM ST_STOCK_DAILY_PRICE D WHERE D.STOCK_ID IN #{id} AND D.TRADING_DATE >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 13 MONTH), '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY D.STOCK_ID, D.TRADING_DATE
SELECT STOCK_DIVISION stockDivision, STANDARD_PRICE standardPrice, ORDER_NUM orderNum FROM ST_STOCK_INTEREST_PARAM ORDER BY ORDER_NUM
mapper.update: INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_INTEREST (STOCK_ID, STOCK_DIVISION, STOCK_QTY, STOCK_POTION) VALUES (#{stockId}, #{stockDivision}, #{qty}, #{stockPotion}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE STOCK_QTY = #{qty}, STOCK_POTION = #{stockPotion}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ST_STOCK_INTEREST WHERE STOCK_ID = #{stockId} AND STOCK_DIVISION = #{stockDivision}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO ST_STOCK_INTEREST_PARAM (STOCK_DIVISION, STANDARD_PRICE, ORDER_NUM) VALUES (#{stockDivision}, #{standardPrice}, #{orderNum}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE STANDARD_PRICE = #{standardPrice}, ORDER_NUM = #{orderNum}

UPDATE ST_STOCK_MASTER M INNER JOIN ( SELECT F.STOCK_ID, F.ROE FROM ST_STOCK_FINANCIAL F INNER JOIN ( SELECT STOCK_ID, MAX(YEAR) maxYear FROM ST_STOCK_FINANCIAL WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' GROUP BY STOCK_ID ) lat ON F.STOCK_ID = lat.STOCK_ID AND F.YEAR = lat.maxYear WHERE F.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND TRIM(F.ROE) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$' AND CAST(TRIM(F.ROE) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) != 0 ) FIN ON M.STOCK_ID = FIN.STOCK_ID SET M.ROE = FIN.ROE

UPDATE ST_STOCK_FINANCIAL SET DIVIDENDS_TENDENCY = ROUND( CAST(TRIM(DIVIDENDS_PER_SHARE) AS DECIMAL(20,2)) / CAST(TRIM(EPS) AS DECIMAL(20,2)) * 100, 2) WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND (DIVIDENDS_TENDENCY IS NULL OR DIVIDENDS_TENDENCY = 0) AND TRIM(DIVIDENDS_PER_SHARE) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$' AND CAST(TRIM(DIVIDENDS_PER_SHARE) AS DECIMAL(20,2)) != 0 AND TRIM(EPS) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$' AND CAST(TRIM(EPS) AS DECIMAL(20,2)) != 0
